data.title: Gold hits another record, surpassing its inflation-adjusted peak 45 years ago
data.description: Gold prices have surpassed their inflation-adjusted peak of 45 years ago, extending their impressive three-year bull run into uncharted territory as concerns about the US economic outlook intensify. Spot gold prices have risen about 5% so far this month, reaching a new all-time high of $3,674.27 on Tuesday. Gold has set more than 30 nominal price records since 2025, with the latest surge surpassing the previous inflation-adjusted high of $850 per ounce reached on January 21, 1980. Taking into account decades of consumer price increases, this price translates to about $3,590—although there are multiple ways to adjust for inflation, and some calculations yield a lower 1980 peak. However, analysts and investors agree that gold has now firmly surpassed this level, further solidifying its status as a time-tested hedge against inflation and currency debasement. (Jinshi)

data.title: Safety Shot establishes subsidiary BONK Holdings to advance BONK's treasury strategy
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Safety Shot announced the establishment of a subsidiary, BONK Holdings LLC, to advance the BONK treasury strategy. The company reportedly purchased 228,908,284,661 BONK tokens at an average cost of 0.00002184, representing approximately 2.5% of the current total BONK supply. (Globenewswire)

data.title: The US Federal Trade Commission is investigating xAI, OpenAI, and other AI chatbot companies.
data.description: The U.S. Federal Trade Commission said on Thursday it is seeking information from seven companies that offer consumer-facing artificial intelligence chatbots: Alphabet, Character Technologies, Instagram, Meta Platforms, OpenAI, Snap, and xAI, about how they measure, test, and monitor potential negative impacts.

data.title: Bitcoin hash rate and difficulty hit record highs
data.description:

According to data from Bitinfocharts, Bitcoin’s hash rate, the total computational power securing the network, reached 1. 12 billion terahashes per second […]

data.title: Tesla Chairman: Musk has completed his political service and returned to Tesla

data.title: Altcoin seasons and risk: Why broad indexes may be the answer to outsized returns
data.description:
Altcoin seasons are volatile and short-lived. Using indexes based on a basket of BTC and altcoins may tap some of the growth, while cutting out risky or irrelevant assets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/altcoin-seasons-and-risk-of-outsized-returns/
